name: Axe
description: Axe is all the reinforcement this army needs!

10.left: +8% Move Speed per active Battle Hunger
10.right: +3s Culling Blade Kill Buff Bonus Duration

abilities.name: One Man Army
abilities.description: Grants Axe temporary based on Axe's current armor. Allied heroes venturing too close to Axe passively disables this effect linearly. Ally Search Radius: 700. Armor to Str Factor: 0.5. Bonus Linger Duration: 3.

abilities.name: Berserker's Call
abilities.description: Berserker's Call now applies Battle Hunger to affected units within the radius. Radius: 315 (400). Armor Bonus: 12/13/14/15 (22/23/24/25). Duration: 2.1/2.4/2.7/3. Cooldown: 18/16/14/12. Mana Cost: 90/100/110/120.

abilities.name: Battle Hunger
abilities.description: Enables the debuff applied to be stackable. Reapplying the debuff now creates an independent debuff instance. Cast Range: 700/775/850/925. Damage per Second: 12/18/24/30 (20/26/32/38). Move Speed Slow: 18%/22%/26%/30%. Duration: 12. Self Move Speed Bonus per Enemy: (8%). Cooldown: 20/15/10/5. Mana Cost: 50/60/70/80.

abilities.name: Counter Helix
abilities.description: After a set number of incoming attacks, Axe performs a helix counter attack, dealing pure damage to all nearby enemies. Radius: 275. Required Incoming Attacks: 7/6/5/4. Damage: 100/120/140/160 (140/160/180/200). Required Attacks: (7/6/5/4). Attack Damage Reduction per Stack: (12%). Duration: (6). Cooldown: 0.3 (0).

abilities.name: Culling Blade
abilities.description: Axe spots a weakness and strikes, dealing pure damage. Grants permanent bonus armor per hero kill credited to Culling Blade, resetting its cooldown at the same time. Cast Range: 175. Damage: 275/375/475 (425/525/625). Damage to Kill Threshold Factor: 1. Buff Radius: 900. Move Speed Bonus: 20%/25%/30%. Armor Bonus: 10/15/20. Cooldown: 80/75/70. Mana Cost: 100/125/150.
